starting_prompt: A fantasy landing page hero image for Luminth, an AI world-building platform. Dark background with magical elements, showing different genre worlds.
final_prompt: Create a striking hero image for Luminth, an AI world-building platform, specifically designed for a website landing page. Use a 16:9 aspect ratio with key elements following the rule-of-thirds. The image should reflect Luminth's visual identity through a dark warm palette of brown-black, teal, and gold, embodying a fantasy-technology fusion. Embrace an illuminated manuscript style with both vivid and refined features. On a dark background, depict an enthralling fusion of genres: on the left, a towering steampunk cityscape rich in mechanical details; in the center, a tranquil elven forest seamlessly transitioning into a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis; on the right, a terrifying, fire-breathing dragon poised over a flaming castle. Implement gradient fade zones at the top and bottom for smooth text overlay. Use dynamic elements, like winding paths and flowing energy lines, to guide the viewer's eye from left to right while ensuring visual harmony. Feature the Luminth logo in the upper third, accentuated by sufficient negative space for clarity.
